pkgmetadata.longdescription: Quickshell is a toolkit for building status bars, widgets, lock screens, and other desktop components using QtQuick. It supports Wayland and X11 and provides integrations for common desktop-shell services.

use.flag: Enable integration with the greetd login daemon
Enable communication with Hyprland's IPC interface
Enable i3 and Sway window-manager integration
Enable communication with the i3/Sway IPC interface
Enable the wlroots layer-shell protocol for panels, overlays, and backgrounds
Enable access to MPRIS-compatible media players
Enable viewing and management of media-video/pipewire nodes
Enable creation of Polkit authentication agents
Enable streaming video from monitors and toplevel windows
Enable the Hyprland toplevel-export screencopy backend
